name: South Dakota Birth to Three
description: South Dakota's Part C early intervention program providing developmental services for infants and toddlers from birth to age 3.

name: The Arc of South Dakota
description: State chapter of The Arc promoting and protecting the rights of people with intellectual and developmental disabilities in South Dakota.

name: Special Olympics South Dakota
description: Year-round sports training and athletic competition for South Dakotans with intellectual disabilities.

name: Disability Rights South Dakota
description: South Dakota's designated protection and advocacy organization providing legal services and advocacy for people with disabilities.
address: 221 S. Central Ave., Suite 38, Pierre, SD 57501

name: South Dakota Division of Rehabilitation Services
description: State vocational rehabilitation services helping South Dakotans with disabilities prepare for and obtain employment.

name: NAMI South Dakota
description: State chapter of the National Alliance on Mental Illness dedicated to improving the lives of persons affected by mental illness through support, education, and advocacy since 1987.

name: South Dakota Assistive Technology Project (DakotaLink)
description: Statewide assistive technology program providing device demonstrations, loans, and information for South Dakotans with disabilities.

name: South Dakota ABLE Account
description: Tax-advantaged ABLE savings accounts for eligible South Dakotans with disabilities to save without impacting public benefits.

name: Sanford Children's Hospital - Developmental Pediatrics
description: Comprehensive developmental and behavioral pediatric evaluations and treatment for children at Sanford Children's in Sioux Falls.

name: Sioux Wheelers Adaptive Sports
description: Nonprofit providing adaptive sports opportunities for youth and adults with physical disabilities, including wheelchair basketball and other competitive and recreational sports.
address: 800 E. I-90 Lane, Sioux Falls, SD 57104
